title: The RealReal Expands AI Push as Luxury Buyers Spend More
text: The RealReal is expanding its AI automation initiatives as luxury buyers continue to increase spending on the platform. Q1 2026 showed strong momentum with GMV growth of 24% year-over-year driven by increased average order values and buyer engagement. The company's Athena AI system has become a key driver of operational efficiency and margin expansion. Athena is expected to process nearly 50% of items by year-end 2026, up from 35% at the end of 2025. The automation of intake processes has freed up authentication experts to focus on complex, high-value items, improving overall throughput and reducing per-unit processing costs. Average order value reached $646, up 15% year-over-year, indicating strong demand for higher-value luxury items. The company's supply-led growth strategy, supported by retail expansion and partnership programs, continues to drive platform growth. Management projects continued momentum into 2026 with guidance for 14%-16% GMV growth and 8% adjusted EBITDA margin at midpoint, representing significant margin expansion from prior years.
